sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The green bar has grown significantly and the red dot is now very close to the cross. Looking at the image, the green bar's red dot appears to be right next to the cross. Let me check the exact positions and then grow the yellow bar to match.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"r: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {n['pixels']}px")
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 7:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Green bar: {n['pixels']}px, right edge col {max(cols)}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 7:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        print(f"Yellow bar: {n['pixels']}px, bottom edge row {max(rows)}")

# Check if level completed
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
The green bar's right edge is at col 51, and the red cross is at col 52. The green bar's red dot is now part of the cross area (rows 9-11, cols 51-53, 5px) - it seems the red dot has merged with the cross! But the level is not complete yet.
The yellow bar's bottom edge is at row 35, and the target cross is at row 52. I need to grow the yellow bar so its red dot reaches row 52.
Current yellow bar: 23 pixels, bottom at row 35. Red dot at row 34.
Target: row 52. Need 52-34 = 18 more rows. Each grow adds 3 rows. 18/3 = 6 grows.
But wait, the green bar's red dot merged with the cross (5px object at cols 51-53). This suggests the red dot overlapped with the cross. So the goal might be to make BOTH red dots overlap with their respective crosses.
Let me grow the yellow bar 6 times.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Grow yellow bar 6 times to reach row 52
# Bottom yellow U-shape (grow): rows 43-45, cols 23-25
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 44, 'col': 24}] * 6)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
